# Validation Gates

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Riido CLI Migration Plan](../cli.md)

Required before a CLI migration PR is mergeable:

```bash
go test ./...
go list -m all
go build ./cmd/riido
go run ./cmd/riido --help
go run ./cmd/riido bridge providers
```

Architecture-doc migration PRs must also pass:

```bash
test -f docs/30-architecture/cli-surface.md
go test ./...
go build -o /tmp/riido ./cmd/riido
go run ./cmd/riido --help
go run ./cmd/riido bridge providers
```

RIID-4686 adds a fake-local-socket mwsd/project gate for `riido mwsd projection` and `riido mwsd sync`. RIID-4690 restores focused daemon lifecycle checks:

```bash
go test ./cmd/riido -run 'TestDaemon|TestLoadDaemon|TestBuildDaemon|TestForeground|TestDaemonBackground' -count=1
go build ./cmd/riido
```

Commands that need a daemon, mwsd socket, provider CLI, or local app state must be black-box smoke tests with explicit skip conditions.
